description: National programs and mission-critical platforms operating at massive volume with zero-tolerance for downtime. Multi-tenant, multi-region, real-time at scale.
useCases: Multi-tenant analytics platform serving multiple entities
Real-time decisioning at scale with sub-100ms SLA
Streaming analytics with event processing (IoT, payments, telco CDR)
Regulatory programs requiring continuous availability (AML, national health)
hadrNotes: Multi-region deployment mandatory. Active-active with geo-replication. RPO=0 (synchronous replication), RTO <15min.
cloudVsOnprem: Multi-cloud or hybrid mandatory. Geographic distribution for disaster recovery, data sovereignty, and latency optimization.
typicalCustomers: Central banks, national payment switches, telco groups (Globe/Smart), government national programs (BIR, PhilHealth), GCash/Maya
